completed_tasks.name: Add fresh-auth probe flow and seed builder wiring
Add seed exclusion attribution and verify empty-seed behavior
completed_tasks.progress: Verified bonjour-fresh-auth-probe-test9; 8 fresh candidates were excluded by historical auto-exclude inputs from bonjour-fresh-auth-probe-test2 probe import handles.

remaining_tasks.name: Decide next expansion after exclusion attribution
Optionally compress blocked-handle attribution into a top offenders summary or rerun with adjusted exclude policy

blockers.description: Fresh-auth seed generation can collapse to zero because historical auto-exclude inputs dominate the latest fresh inputs.
blockers.workaround: Inspect output/bonjour-raw/2026-04-18/bonjour-fresh-auth-probe-test9/recent-seed-blocked-handles.json and blocked-reasons.json before changing the builder or rerunning.

blockers.description: Some legacy .planning documents still contain placeholder markers and should not be treated as completion evidence.
blockers.workaround: Ignore placeholder-bearing files in .planning/phases and older github-expansion notes unless they are actively refreshed.

human_actions_pending.action: Choose whether the next step is more reporting or a new authenticated crawl variant
human_actions_pending.context: Current code path is committed and verified; remaining work is direction-setting rather than unfinished implementation.

human_actions_pending.action: Push local Bonjour commits if desired
human_actions_pending.context: Commits 8c150c1 and 9ad4aff are local only; only 5bde1df was pushed earlier.

decisions.decision: CLI remains the only formal product entry; web is not the primary surface.
decisions.rationale: User explicitly rejected web as the formal entry and wants CLI-centered integration.

decisions.decision: Default historical excludes were narrowed to prior fresh-auth-consumed artifacts instead of all old frontier files.
decisions.rationale: Blanket historical frontier exclusion over-pruned candidate discovery and made the experiment uninformative.

decisions.decision: Fresh seed discovery uses a recency window and small latest-cluster cap.
decisions.rationale: Using all available same-day seed files kept re-consuming the same handles and hid whether the experiment was seeing anything new.

decisions.decision: Blocked-handle attribution report must distinguish auto excludes, recent seed excludes, and manual excludes.
decisions.rationale: The initial report blamed recent seed dedupe by default, but the verified zero-output case was actually caused by auto-excluded historical probe imports.

next_action: Start by reading the test9 summary and blocked-handle report, then decide whether to compress that data into a top blocked summary or loosen the auto-exclude policy for the next fresh-auth probe.
context_notes: The current repo branch is main at 9ad4aff. No active phase directory was detected, so this handoff is stored as a research/default pause state under .planning. No background processes need to be preserved. Worker typecheck passed. Treat apps/web/next-env.d.ts as unrelated user work and do not include it in future Bonjour commits unless explicitly requested. Placeholder-bearing planning docs were detected under .planning/phases and older github-expansion notes; do not use them as completion proof.
